title: Female Street Photographer Portrait 2 AI
sourceTitle: Female Street Photographer Portrait 2 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic black-and-white urban photographer portrait built around adult female street photographer with loosely tied dark hair, expressive sharp eyes, and quiet documentary focus, compact mirrorless camera held carefully with both hands, black turtleneck top with a camera strap draped around the neck, and city sidewalk with blurred passersby and ambient lights melting into creamy bokeh. Subject: adult female street photographer with loosely tied dark hair, expressive sharp eyes, and quiet documentary focus stands on a city sidewalk holding compact mirrorless camera held carefully with both hands; black turtleneck top with a camera strap draped around the neck defines the visible styling while the expression stays natural, focused, and documentary. Scene: city sidewalk with blurred passersby and ambient lights melting into creamy bokeh creates the urban backdrop with blurred passersby, ambient lights, storefront depth, and creamy street bokeh. Composition: Fixed vertical near-camera street portrait: subject standing on the sidewalk, camera held with both hands at chest level, camera strap visible, face clearly readable, shallow depth of field, and magazine-documentary hierarchy. Signature Elements: Mirrorless or rangefinder camera held with both hands, black wardrobe silhouette, blurred passersby, ambient street lights, delicate natural makeup, sharp expressive eyes, and heavy monochrome film grain. Fixed source details: Team Color Accent: vibrant red-orange national-team jersey, socks, boots, and football accents. Style: Cinematic black-and-white editorial street photography with candid documentary atmosphere, timeless fashion-photo restraint, true-to-life portrait texture, heavy film grain, and high-end monochrome finish. Color Palette: Fixed high-contrast monochrome palette with deep blacks, bright facial highlights, soft gray midtones, creamy bokeh lights, and crisp black clothing separation. Lighting: Soft natural city light with readable facial structure, controlled shadows, subtle catchlights, and realistic texture without studio smoothing. Camera: 85mm portrait lens look, shallow depth of field, compressed urban background, creamy bokeh, close documentary crop, and crisp central facial focus. Materials: Camera body, lens glass, camera strap, knit fabric, wispy hair strands, city pavement, storefront reflections, and film-grain texture stay visible. Restrictions: Keep one coherent adult portrait subject, believable hands around the camera, natural expression, clear camera shape, black-and-white finish, and uncluttered street depth.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Subject: adult creative photographer with short wavy hair, focused gaze, and calm city-documentary presence stands on a city sidewalk holding vintage rangefinder camera held close with both hands and a simple leather strap; dark wool coat over a plain black knit top with minimal city styling defines the visible styling while the expression stays natural, focused, and documentary. Scene: rainy downtown street corner with soft signage glow, wet pavement reflections, and distant pedestrians in bokeh creates the urban backdrop with blurred passersby, ambient lights, storefront depth, and creamy street bokeh. Composition: Fixed vertical near-camera street portrait: subject standing on the sidewalk, camera held with both hands at chest level, camera strap visible, face clearly readable, shallow depth of field, and magazine-documentary hierarchy. Signature Elements: Mirrorless or rangefinder camera held with both hands, black wardrobe silhouette, blurred passersby, ambient street lights, delicate natural makeup, sharp expressive eyes, and heavy monochrome film grain. Fixed source details: Team Color Accent: electric blue and white jersey, socks, boots, football, and neon outline accents. Style: Cinematic black-and-white editorial street photography with candid documentary atmosphere, timeless fashion-photo restraint, true-to-life portrait texture, heavy film grain, and high-end monochrome finish. Color Palette: Fixed high-contrast monochrome palette with deep blacks, bright facial highlights, soft gray midtones, creamy bokeh lights, and crisp black clothing separation. Lighting: Soft natural city light with readable facial structure, controlled shadows, subtle catchlights, and realistic texture without studio smoothing. Camera: 85mm portrait lens look, shallow depth of field, compressed urban background, creamy bokeh, close documentary crop, and crisp central facial focus. Materials: Camera body, lens glass, camera strap, knit fabric, wispy hair strands, city pavement, storefront reflections, and film-grain texture stay visible. Restrictions: Keep one coherent adult portrait subject, believable hands around the camera, natural expression, clear camera shape, black-and-white finish, and uncluttered street depth.
